onset.Description: Onset time of the trial in seconds from the start of the recording

duration.Description: Duration of the trial (5 repetitions x 1.25 sec each)

trial_type.Description: Color word spoken in the trial

value.Description: Numeric label index corresponding to the color word (0-4)

session_type.Description: Whether data was collected during offline calibration or online decoding

Levels.calibration: Offline data collection for decoder training
Levels.online: Real-time decoding session with trained decoder
